title: Jensen Huang Q&A prep — AI girlfriends, simulation, post-automation jobs
html:
Jensen Huang Q&A prep — AI girlfriends, simulation, post-automation jobs

Source: 2024-04-09 Apple Note. Yahir prepped questions for what appears to be a Jensen Huang event — likely an OSU talk or NVIDIA appearance. Spans AI ethics, Masayoshi Son gossip, and the leather-jacket origin story.

TL;DR

  • Big-swing questions for Jensen Huang: "are we in a simulation?", "thoughts on AI girlfriends?", "should we shift from servant-master to collaborative partner with AI?"
  • "How important part has Lisa played in your success?" — surfacing Lisa Su (AMD CEO) parallel.
  • "masayoshi son, what is your relationship with him and what is his next move" — Yahir's Son obsession surfaces in another context.
  • The 70%-jobs-automated UBI question: "now there's 70% population that is left with no income but jobs automated or creating abundance right demon question" — one of his earliest written framings of the UBI thesis.
  • Question about defaulting to AI over humans: "You talked about an approaching / maybe already here future where people default to ai because it is more human than other humans" — the AI-as-substitute-for-human-connection concern that becomes a theme in the ideas notebook (CarBUDDY, AI avatar, talking-Tom-loneliness).

Pattern observed

Yahir as interrogator-of-mentors-from-afar: prepares dense ladder-of-abstraction questions before any Q&A opportunity. Same pattern shows up before Coinbase pitches (2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream) and the Sam confrontation just two weeks later. He drafts before he speaks.

Open questions

  • Did the Jensen event actually happen? Was a question selected?
  • The leather-jacket origin question — was that ever answered publicly by Jensen?

  • masayoshi son
